import openai
import tiktoken

def summarize_document(huge_text):
    # Correct: precisely count tokens using the model's tokenizer to prevent API rejections
    encoding = tiktoken.encoding_for_model("gpt-3.5-turbo")
    if len(encoding.encode(huge_text)) > 4000:
        raise ValueError("Document exceeds maximum token limit")
        
    response = openai.Completion.create(model="gpt-3.5-turbo", prompt=huge_text)
    return response.choices[0].text
